<mxfile host="Electron" agent="Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) draw.io/29.6.1 Chrome/142.0.7444.265 Electron/39.8.0 Safari/537.36" version="29.6.1"> <diagram name="RAG原理" id="JeN9FOvXWAgYflKhdY4n"> <mxGraphModel dx="1426" dy="841" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="827" pageHeight="1169" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="Bhul7sGAmfLkgONRJyXe-1" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;fontColor=#333333;strokeColor=#666666;movable=0;resizable=0;rotatable=0;deletable=0;editable=0;locked=1;connectable=0;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="860" width="1150" x="30" y="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="online" parent="1" style="swimlane;horizontal=0;fillColor=#fff2cc;" value="Online Query" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="320" width="980" x="170" y="490" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="query" parent="online" style="rounded=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="User Query" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="110" x="65" y="35" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="VHBR9QpowkUkVphAsDDa-7" edge="1" parent="online" source="VHBR9QpowkUkVphAsDDa-6" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;strokeColor=#009900;" target="answer"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="820" y="265" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="retrieve" parent="online" style="rounded=1;" value="Vector Search
(数据库本身支持)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="120" x="360" y="35" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="VHBR9QpowkUkVphAsDDa-16" edge="1" parent="online" source="rerank" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;strokeColor=#CC0000;" target="context"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="rerank" parent="online" style="rounded=1;" value="Re-rank" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="110" x="525" y="35" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="context" parent="online" style="rounded=1;" value="Top-K Context" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="130" x="515" y="140" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="prompt" parent="online" style="rounded=1;" value="Prompt 增强
(提问 + 参考资料)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="160" x="500" y="235" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e8" edge="1" parent="online" source="context" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;endArrow=block;strokeColor=#CC0000;" target="prompt"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e9" edge="1" parent="online" source="prompt" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;endArrow=block;strokeColor=#009900;" target="VHBR9QpowkUkVphAsDDa-6"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="620" y="265" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="answer" parent="online" style="rounded=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="Answer" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="110" x="800" y="110" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="VHBR9QpowkUkVphAsDDa-6" parent="online" style="ellipse;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;" value="LLM 模型" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="120" x="795" y="225" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="VHBR9QpowkUkVphAsDDa-15" edge="1" parent="online" source="query" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;strokeColor=#009900;" target="prompt"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="120" y="270" /> </Array> <mxPoint x="250" y="50" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="385" y="160" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="offline" parent="1" style="swimlane;horizontal=0;fillColor=#dae8fc;" value="Offline Indexing (数据索引)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="300" width="520" x="170" y="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="doc" parent="offline" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="原始文档Raw Documents
(PDF/code/Wiki)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="130" x="220" y="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="uv9kOYuxXfCFQPnunwoL-4" edge="1" parent="offline" source="chunk" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;" target="vectordb"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="415" y="120" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="uv9kOYuxXfCFQPnunwoL-5" connectable="0" parent="uv9kOYuxXfCFQPnunwoL-4" style="edgeLabel;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;resizable=0;points=[];" value="rawData" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" x="0.1005" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="-41" y="-10" as="offset" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="chunk" parent="offline" style="rounded=1;" value="文本切块 & 清洗
